query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: get quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class in Trondheim extent

4.description: find buildings intersecting quick-clay high risk areas

5.description: calculate distance from each building to municipality centroid

6.description: deduplicate buildings to one row per building with min distance

7.description: sort by distance ascending, then building ID ascending

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredfaregradklasse, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, skredskadekonsekvensklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr ORDER BY skredfaregradklasse, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, skredskadekonsekvensklasse
